title.en: Active implantable medical devices - Part 2-1: Particular requirements for active implantable medical devices intended to treat bradyarrhythmia (cardiac pacemakers)

standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for active implantable medical devices intended to treat bradyarrhythmia (cardiac pacemakers). Developed under AIMDD 90/385/EEC, remains state-of-the-art reference for EU MDR.
standards.scope: Active implantable medical devices -- Particular requirements for active implantable medical devices intended to treat bradyarrhythmia (cardiac pacemakers).
standards.note: Developed under AIMDD 90/385/EEC. Not harmonised under EU MDR but remains relevant state-of-the-art reference.

title.en: Active implantable medical devices - Part 2-2: Particular requirements for active implantable medical devices intended to treat tachyarrhythmia (includes implantable defibrillators)

standards.abstract: Specifies particular requirements for active implantable medical devices intended to treat tachyarrhythmia (implantable cardioverter defibrillators). Developed under AIMDD 90/385/EEC, remains state-of-the-art reference for EU MDR.
standards.scope: Active implantable medical devices -- Particular requirements for active implantable medical devices intended to treat tachyarrhythmia (includes implantable defibrillators).
standards.note: Developed under AIMDD 90/385/EEC. Not harmonised under EU MDR but remains relevant state-of-the-art reference.

title.en: Implants for surgery - Active implantable medical devices - Part 2: Cardiac pacemakers

standards.abstract: Particular requirements for cardiac pacemaker implants.

title.en: Implants for surgery - Active implantable medical devices - Part 3: Implantable neurostimulators
Implants for surgery - Active implantable medical devices - Part 7: Cochlear implant systems

standards.abstract: Particular requirements for cochlear implant systems.
